en: A SONG OF ASCENTS.I lift up my eyes to the hills. From where does my help come?
zh: 我要向群山舉目， 我的幫助從哪裡來呢？

en: My help comes from the LORD, who made heaven and earth.
zh: 我的幫助是從 造天地的耶和華而來。

en: He will not let your foot be moved; he who keeps you will not slumber.
zh: 他必不使你的腳滑倒； 保護你的必不打盹。

en: Behold, he who keeps Israel will neither slumber nor sleep.
zh: 看哪！保護以色列的， 必不打盹，也不睡覺。

en: The LORD is your keeper; the LORD is your shade on your right hand.
zh: 保護你的是耶和華， 耶和華在你的右邊蔭庇你。

en: The sun shall not strike you by day, nor the moon by night.
zh: 白天太陽必不傷你， 夜裡月亮必不害你。

en: The LORD will keep you from all evil; he will keep your life.
zh: 耶和華要保護你脫離一切災禍， 他要保護你的性命。

en: The LORD will keep your going out and your coming in from this time forth and forevermore.
zh: 你出你入，耶和華要保護你， 從現在直到永遠。
